terminal.unavailable: The virtual terminal is currently unavailable. Clone and doc-generation requests can still run, but live logs will not stream into this page. Check the terminal service address or your `VITE_TERMINAL_WS_URL` / `/ws` proxy configuration.

login.title: Sign in with GitLab
login.subtitle: Use your GitLab account via OAuth. RepoPilot never sees your GitLab password.
login.gitlabHint: You will be redirected to GitLab to approve access, then returned to RepoPilot.
login.redirectNote: If your deployment uses a custom OAuth entry, set VITE_GITLAB_OAUTH_LOGIN_URL in the web environment.
login.demoHint: Preview generated documentation with built-in mock data—no GitLab or backend required.

dashboardEntry.title: Dashboard
dashboardEntry.subtitle: All linked repositories live in one calm surface—instantly open details, kick off docs, or ship a deployment.

repos.title: Repositories
repos.subtitle: Pick a repository to generate structured docs or ship a deployment—same flow as modern hosting dashboards, tuned for your GitLab server.

closing.title: Ship faster with confidence
closing.subtitle: Configure webhooks once—then automate documentation refreshes and production deployments without leaving RepoPilot.

footer.line1: © {{year}} RepoPilot · Documentation from source · Traceable deployments
footer.line2: GitLab integration · WebSocket streaming · Enterprise-grade session security

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.lede: RepoPilot turns JavaDoc and repository metadata into always-up-to-date internal documentation. GitLab webhooks trigger incremental rebuilds; parse issues surface as alerts without blocking your delivery pipeline.

mockMode.hint: Demo mode: no GitLab or backend connection. You can try clone and doc generation locally.

success.tokenSaved: Token saved for this browser session.
success.cloneCompleted: Clone completed: {{projectPath}}. Synced to dashboard list.

errors.tokenRequired: Please enter a GitLab token first.
errors.projectIdInvalid: Please enter a project ID greater than 0.
errors.projectIdRequiredForDoc: Project ID is required before generating docs.

backend.gitlabTokenRequired: No GitLab token is available in the current browser session. Save the token again before cloning.
backend.gitlabProjectNotFound: GitLab project not found: {{projectId}}. Verify the project ID.
backend.branchNotFound: Branch not found: {{branch}}. Verify the branch name.
backend.invalidToken: The GitLab token is invalid, or the current account cannot access this repository.
backend.cloneFailed: Repository clone failed. Check the GitLab token and repository read permissions.
backend.localDirExists: {{message}}. If this repository was cloned before, you can generate local docs directly.
backend.localFileIoFailed: The backend hit an I/O error during cloning. This original message is generic and usually means the backend could not reach the GitLab repository URL, or it could not create or write the local clone directory. Check the GitLab API/repository URL, clone-directory permissions, and whether the target directory already exists.

structured.title: Structured docs
structured.parseMissing: Structured JSON is not available for this file.

terminal.title: Virtual console
terminal.subtitle: Doc generation and webhook-driven rebuilds stream here once a session is attached.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.lede: Deploy commits with one click. Runs execute through the backend PTY runner with live WebSocket logs, cancellation, timeouts, and exactly-once protections per commit.

terminal.title: Virtual console
terminal.subtitle: Deploy scripts and PTY logs will appear here when the runner session is connected.

actions.title: Trigger deployment
actions.artifactPlaceholder: Leave empty to auto-discover the latest artifact

success.sshKeySetup: SSH key setup succeeded. Future deploys will not require a password.

errors.projectIdInvalid: Project ID must be a valid numeric GitLab project id.
errors.noActiveTask: No running deployment task to cancel.
errors.sshPasswordRequired: Please fill in target host, remote user, and SSH password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.lede: GitLab-linked projects appear below. Tap a card for fullscreen details—or jump straight into docs generation and deployments.
dashboard.cardHint: Click anywhere on the card for fullscreen details.

repoDescriptions.acme-platform-api: Core platform API—identity, authorization, and organization capabilities.
repoDescriptions.billing-svc: Billing and subscription processing with reconciliation and audit trails.
repoDescriptions.docs-hub: Central documentation portal with search and cross-repo navigation.

dashboard.syncFailed: Failed to sync GitLab projects. Check that your token is valid.

docView.title: Documentation Viewer
docView.empty: No docs yet. Generate them first.
docView.noRepo: Select a repository from the dashboard, or generate docs first.

terminal.title: Document Scan
terminal.subtitle: Real-time output from the document generation pipeline.
terminal.scanCompleted: Scan completed: {{scanned}} file(s), {{generated}} generated, {{skipped}} skipped, {{failed}} failed, {{retried}} retried, {{recovered}} recovered.
